search_query.title: Search Query
search_query.description: arXiv API search query, for example `cat:cs.AI`, `all:electron`, or `au:del_maestro`.

start_date.title: Start Date
start_date.description: Optional ISO-8601 timestamp. Records with `updated` at or before this value are skipped.

max_results_per_page.title: Max Results Per Page
max_results_per_page.description: Number of records requested per page. arXiv supports up to 2000 records per request.
